page_content:
Prerequisite: Permission of AGNR-Plant Science & Landscape Architecture department.

Restriction: Junior standing or higher. And must be in Plant Sciences program; or must be in Landscape Architecture program.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

PLSC398 Seminar (1 Credit)

Oral presentation of the results of investigational work by reviewing recent scientific literature in the various phases of natural resource sciences, horticulture and agronomy.

Restriction: Senior standing. And must be in Landscape Architecture program; or must be in Plant Sciences program.
